signal_title: Lei Federal nº 15.211/2025 (ECA Digital or Lei Felca)
risk_rationale: The new Brazilian law introduces a prohibition on self-declaration of age and requires account linking for minors, which are not currently addressed in TikTok's internal baseline. This presents a material compliance gap that requires immediate product changes to ensure compliance with the new legislation.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: TikTok states it uses machine learning and safety review to identify likely under-13 users and remove/limit access.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The current baseline allows for self-declaration of age, which is prohibited under the new Brazilian law.

compliance_gaps.baseline_requirement: Parent can view teen follower/following context and blocked-account settings.
compliance_gaps.gap_description: The current baseline does not require account linking for minors, which is mandated by the new Brazilian law.

remediations.title: Implement Age Verification Mechanism
remediations.description: Develop and implement a robust age verification mechanism that does not rely on self-declaration to comply with Brazilian law.
acceptance_criteria: Age verification mechanism is implemented and operational.
Self-declaration of age is disabled for Brazilian users.

remediations.title: Develop Account Linking Feature for Minors
remediations.description: Create a feature that requires minors to link their accounts to a parent or guardian account to comply with Brazilian law.
acceptance_criteria: Account linking feature is developed and available for Brazilian users.
Minors are unable to complete registration without linking to a parent or guardian account.

business_impact: Failure to comply with the new Brazilian law could result in significant fines and potential restrictions on platform operations within Brazil.
recommended_actions: Prioritize development of age verification and account linking features.
Engage with Brazilian legal counsel to ensure full compliance with Lei Federal nº 15.211/2025.
Monitor implementation progress and adjust timelines as necessary to meet the effective date.
